title: hieracium levicaule subsp. killiasii
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. killiasii, also known as the Killias' hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium levicaule subsp. killiasii include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with some traditional remedies also using it in salves or tinctures for topical application.
